TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Pico_Alexander, title = Pico_Alexander, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pico_Alexander} }

S.FORM: Pico Alexander kawas tay 1991, ryax sa tay 3 nqu tay 6, Pico Alexander, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
Pico Alexander kawas tay 1991, ryax sa tay 3 nqu tay 6, Pico Alexander, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: piʦ~ʨo alexan*er kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, piʦ~ʨo alexan*er, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
